flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Peninsula College are 15% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($37.1k vs $43.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Peninsula College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (50.8% → 36.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Peninsula College rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.6k → $15.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Peninsula College fell 12% between 2008 and 2011 (53.9% → 47.6%).
